name: Simple WebDAV Sync

releases.author: gghyoo
releases.description:
## Bug Fix

- **Fix Chinese/non-ASCII URL encoding mismatch in `_stripBasePrefix`**
  - When the server URL contains non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese), `new URL(baseUrl).pathname` returns percent-encoded path, but the href from PROPFIND XML response is decoded via `decodeURIComponent` to raw characters.
  - This caused the `startsWith` check to fail, leading to duplicated paths in PROPFIND requests and **404 errors**.
  - Fix: decode `basePath` the same way as `href` before comparison.

## What's Changed
- `main.js`: Added URI decoding loop for `basePath` in `_stripBasePrefix()` method

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gghyoo/simple-webdav/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
releases.name: v1.0.1 — Fix Chinese URL encoding

releases.author: gghyoo
releases.description:
Initial release.

- ETag + SHA-256 three-way comparison sync
- Two-way sync with conflict detection (keep both versions)
- Safe delete policy (local delete → server restore, remote delete → .sync_trash)
- Real-time sync with configurable debounce
- Auto sync interval + sync on close
- Bilingual (EN/ZH) with auto-detection
- Trash management in settings
- Notification toggle
releases.name: v1.0.0
